firstEntryDescription.text:
You jolt upwards.
You disconnect the ECG cables attached to your chest as you get a grasp of your surroundings. You find yourself on the operating table of some non-descript lab. Incision tools are scattered about as if the ones operating on you left in a hurry.
As you were getting accustomed to your surroundings, you felt as if something was moving underneath your skin. Panic surges inside you as you look around to find a way to escape.
The door to the northeast is sealed shut, but the observation window to the north is shattered. The other side seems like a good place to move to if you’re mindful of the glass.

description.text:
Hello World!
There is an exit to the north.
 You find yourself on the operating table of some non-descript lab. Incision tools are scattered about as if the ones operating on you left in a hurry.
 As you were getting accustomed to your surroundings, you felt as if something was moving underneath your skin. Panic surges inside you as you look around to find a way to escape.

You did it!
There is an exit to the south.
